'''zolayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataxanomic|ataxanomic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataxanomic|ataxanomic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zolayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolayithi|zolayithi]] || [[word:zolayiji|zolayiji]] || [[word:zolayishi|zolayishi]] || [[word:zolayiki|zolayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolayuthuthu|zolayuthuthu]] || [[word:zolayujuju|zolayujuju]] || [[word:zolayushushu|zolayushushu]] || [[word:zolayukuku|zolayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolayuthu|zolayuthu]] || [[word:zolayuju|zolayuju]] || [[word:zolayushu|zolayushu]] || [[word:zolayuku|zolayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolayufthuf|zolayufthuf]] || [[word:zolayufjuf|zolayufjuf]] || [[word:zolayufshuf|zolayufshuf]] || [[word:zolayufkuf|zolayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolayethe|zolayethe]] || [[word:zolayeje|zolayeje]] || [[word:zolayeshe|zolayeshe]] || [[word:zolayeke|zolayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolayothotho|zolayothotho]] || [[word:zolayojojo|zolayojojo]] || [[word:zolayoshosho|zolayoshosho]] || [[word:zolayokoko|zolayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolayotho|zolayotho]] || [[word:zolayojo|zolayojo]] || [[word:zolayosho|zolayosho]] || [[word:zolayoko|zolayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolayofthof|zolayofthof]] || [[word:zolayofjof|zolayofjof]] || [[word:zolayofshof|zolayofshof]] || [[word:zolayofkof|zolayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfthÃŸf|zolayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfjÃŸf|zolayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfshÃŸf|zolayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfkÃŸf|zolayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zolayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zolayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zolayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zolayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfthÃŸf|zolayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfjÃŸf|zolayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfshÃŸf|zolayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfkÃŸf|zolayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfthÃŸf|zolayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfjÃŸf|zolayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfshÃŸf|zolayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolayÃŸfkÃŸf|zolayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolayÃḊthÃḊ|zolayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zolayÃḊjÃḊ|zolayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zolayÃḊshÃḊ|zolayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zolayÃḊkÃḊ|zolayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolayathatha|zolayathatha]] || [[word:zolayajaja|zolayajaja]] || [[word:zolayashasha|zolayashasha]] || [[word:zolayakaka|zolayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolayatha|zolayatha]] || [[word:zolayaja|zolayaja]] || [[word:zolayasha|zolayasha]] || [[word:zolayaka|zolayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolayafthaf|zolayafthaf]] || [[word:zolayafjaf|zolayafjaf]] || [[word:zolayafshaf|zolayafshaf]] || [[word:zolayafkaf|zolayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zolayasha|zolayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zolayshÃḋsha|zolayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zolayrosha|zolayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zolaymusha|zolaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zolayasha|zolayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozolaynkshÃḋsha|gozolaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozolaynkrosha|gozolaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozolaynkmusha|gozolaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozolaynkyasha|gozolaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zolalayasha|zolalayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zolalayshÃḋsha|zolalayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zolalayrosha|zolalayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zolalaymusha|zolalaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zolalayasha|zolalayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozolalaynkshÃḋsha|gozolalaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozolalaynkrosha|gozolalaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozolalaynkmusha|gozolalaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozolalaynkyasha|gozolalaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zelÃḊyasha|zelÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zelÃḊyshÃḋsha|zelÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zelÃḊyrosha|zelÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zelÃḊymusha|zelÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zelÃḊyasha|zelÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozelÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gozelÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozelÃḊynkrosha|gozelÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozelÃḊynkmusha|gozelÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozelÃḊynkyasha|gozelÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zolfayasha|zolfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zolfayshÃḋsha|zolfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zolfayrosha|zolfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zolfaymusha|zolfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zolfayasha|zolfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozolfaynkshÃḋsha|gozolfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozolfaynkrosha|gozolfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozolfaynkmusha|gozolfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozolfaynkyasha|gozolfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
